cases.title: TS-14: Check-in allowed while session Active and within attendance window
preconditions: Active session with openedAt set, scheduledStart in the past, and status Active
Test clock fixed so openedAt ≤ now ≤ min(closedAt, scheduledStart + 10 minutes) per state-machines §2.4
Authenticated enrolled Student with valid unexpired QR token
Student coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and in-radius coordinates using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200 and outcome Success
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance for the student
Assert attendance status is Present with checkedInAt populated
cases.expected: Check-in succeeds when session Active and windowStart ≤ now ≤ windowEnd per state-machines §2.4 and BR-01; session remains Active until window end or manual close

cases.title: TS-15: Auto-close at scheduledStart + 10 minutes transitions Closed and Pending to Absent
preconditions: Active session with M students in Pending status
Instructor has not manually closed the session
Test clock injectable; advance to scheduledStart + 10 minutes + 1 second
AutoCloseScheduler job enabled in test environment
steps: Trigger AutoCloseScheduler tick at advanced clock time
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status Closed with closedAt set
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and assert summary.pending is 0 and summary.absent equals M
Query attendance_records for sessionId and verify all previously Pending rows are Absent
cases.expected: System scheduler auto-closes session per BR-01 trigger when now ≥ scheduledStart + 10 min; all Pending attendance records become Absent

cases.title: TS-16: Late check-in after session Closed returns SessionNotActive and Absent unchanged
preconditions: Closed session with student attendance status Absent (was Pending at close)
Authenticated enrolled Student session available
QR token for the closed session (valid or expired)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and valid coordinates using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 and outcome SessionNotActive with errorCode SessionNotActive
Assert localized Vietnamese message indicates session is not active
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance for the student and assert status remains Absent
cases.expected: Late check-in rejected per BR-01 outcome; Absent status unchanged unless instructor manually overrides per BR-10

cases.title: SessionCloseFinalize bulk updates Pending to Absent in single Postgres transaction
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Active session with K Pending and P Present attendance records
SessionService.close wired to AttendanceService.finalizeOnClose
steps: Invoke SessionService.close(sessionId) under owning Instructor context
Query sessions table and assert status Closed with closed_at set
Query attendance_records for sessionId where status was Pending before close
Assert all K previously Pending rows are now Absent
Assert all P Present rows remain Present unchanged
cases.expected: Manual close trigger per BR-01: session transitions Closed; Pending→Absent bulk update; Present records preserved

cases.title: AutoCloseScheduler transitions Active to Closed at attendance window end
preconditions: Active session row with scheduled_start in the past and status Active
TestClock fixed at scheduledStart + 10 minutes
AutoCloseScheduler queries Active sessions past window end per state-machines §2.4
steps: Record beforeState Active from sessions table
Invoke AutoCloseScheduler.run() or equivalent tick
Query sessions table for sessionId and read status and closed_at
Query attendance_records and count Absent vs Pending for enrolled students
cases.expected: beforeState Active, afterState Closed; closedAt set at window end; same finalize side effects as manual close per BR-01

cases.title: CheckInService rejects check-in when now exceeds windowEnd before close
preconditions: Active session row in PostgreSQL with scheduled_start and openedAt known
TestClock fixed at scheduledStart + 10 minutes + 1 second
CheckInService attendance window guard uses windowEnd = min(closedAt, scheduledStart + 10 min) per validation-rules §5.1 step 6
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submitCheckIn with valid token, enrollment, and coordinates
Capture result outcome without committing Present status
Query attendance_records for studentId and sessionId
Assert outcome SessionNotActive and attendance status remains Pending
cases.expected: Attendance window end enforced at Layer 4 when now > windowEnd per state-machines §2.4; no Present record created per BR-01

cases.title: POST /api/v1/check-in returns 403 SessionNotActive when session is Closed
preconditions: Closed sessionId with enrolled Student authenticated
Student has Absent attendance record from session finalize
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and valid coordinates using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response body contains errorCode SessionNotActive and outcome SessionNotActive
Assert response envelope matches check-in failure contract per API design §6.3
cases.expected: HTTP 403 with SessionNotActive errorCode per validation-rules §4 BR-01 mapping

cases.title: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close returns 200 with Closed Session DTO and stops check-in
preconditions: Instructor session cookie is set
Active sessionId owned by instructor with at least one Pending attendance record
Current time is before scheduledStart + 10 minutes (manual early close scenario)
steps: Send POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body contains status Closed and closedAt timestamp earlier than scheduledStart + 10 min
POST /api/v1/check-in as enrolled Student and assert HTTP 403 SessionNotActive
cases.expected: Manual instructor close per BR-01 trigger sets closedAt as effective windowEnd; subsequent check-in rejected

cases.title: Check-in at scheduledStart + 10 minutes exactly is allowed (inclusive windowEnd)
preconditions: Active session with openedAt ≤ scheduledStart + 10 minutes
Test clock fixed at exactly scheduledStart + 10 minutes
Authenticated enrolled Student with valid unexpired QR token and in-radius coordinates
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and coordinates using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200 and outcome Success
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance for the student
Assert attendance status is Present
cases.expected: windowEnd is inclusive (now ≤ min(closedAt, scheduledStart + 10 min)) per state-machines §2.4; check-in allowed at exact boundary

cases.title: Check-in one second after windowEnd returns 403 SessionNotActive while session still Active
preconditions: Active session with scheduledStart in the past and openedAt ≤ scheduledStart + 10 minutes
Test clock fixed at scheduledStart + 10 minutes + 1 second before auto-close scheduler runs
Authenticated enrolled Student with valid QR token
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 and outcome SessionNotActive with errorCode SessionNotActive
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status is still Active until scheduler runs
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance for student and assert status remains Pending
cases.expected: Check-in rejected when now > windowEnd per state-machines §2.4 and BR-01; SessionNotActive returned before auto-close finalize

cases.title: Manual close before scheduled window end sets closedAt as effective windowEnd
preconditions: Active session opened 2 minutes ago with scheduledStart in the past
Current time is scheduledStart + 5 minutes (before nominal 10-minute window end)
SessionService.close available under Instructor context
steps: Record scheduledStart and compute nominal windowEnd scheduledStart + 10 min
Invoke SessionService.close(sessionId)
Query sessions table and assert closed_at is before nominal windowEnd
Attempt CheckInService.submitCheckIn and assert SessionNotActive outcome
cases.expected: Instructor manual close sets closedAt as effective windowEnd per state-machines §2.4; check-in rejected when now > closedAt even if before scheduledStart + 10 min

cases.title: Student denied POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session is available
Active sessionId within attendance window exists
Student role lacks session:write permission per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status remains Active
Verify attendance window remains open for eligible check-ins
cases.expected: Only instructor may manually close session per BR-01 trigger; Student cannot end attendance window via close endpoint

cases.title: Student denied POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session is available
Draft session with valid GPS exists
Student role lacks session:write permission
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status remains Draft
cases.expected: Student cannot open sessions; attendance window cannot be started by Student role

cases.title: Instructor manually closes Active session and monitor shows Pending finalized to Absent
preconditions: Instructor is logged in to instructor SPA
Active session in progress with mix of Present and Pending students
Instructor navigates to session monitor or detail page
steps: Click Đóng buổi học (close session) action
Confirm close in dialog prompt (*Kết thúc điểm danh?*)
Wait for status badge update to Đã kết thúc (Closed)
Verify roster table shows remaining Pending students marked Vắng (Absent)
Verify monitor tab shows banner *Buổi học đã kết thúc* and polling stops
Verify QR display and check-in actions are unavailable
cases.expected: Manual close via UI per BR-01 instructor trigger; attendance window closed; Pending students finalized to Absent

cases.title: Student check-in page shows session-ended message after attendance window closes
preconditions: Session is Closed (manual close or auto-close after scheduledStart + 10 min)
Authenticated Student navigates to check-in deep link with stale QR token
Student attendance status is Absent
steps: Student opens check-in page for closed session
Submit check-in or observe page state after load
Verify Vietnamese error message indicates session not active or has ended
Verify no success confirmation and attendance remains Absent
cases.expected: UI surfaces SessionNotActive outcome per BR-01 after window end; late scans explain Absent state

cases.title: Instructor session detail shows Active status badge during open attendance window
preconditions: Instructor is logged in with Active session in progress
Current time satisfies openedAt ≤ now ≤ min(closedAt, scheduledStart + 10 minutes) per state-machines §2.4
Instructor navigates to session detail page
steps: Verify session status badge shows Đang diễn ra (Active)
Verify openedAt timestamp is visible
Verify links to QR display and live monitor are enabled
Verify close-session action is available to instructor
cases.expected: UI reflects Active session state during BR-01 attendance window; instructor can monitor and close session

cases.title: Parallel manual close and auto-close yield single Closed transition without duplicate finalize
preconditions: Active session past scheduledStart + 10 minutes on TestClock
AutoCloseScheduler and SessionService.close both eligible to run
Optimistic lock on Session.version enabled per 06-main-workflows.md §9
steps: Launch parallel SessionService.close(sessionId) and AutoCloseScheduler tick for same sessionId
Await both operations to settle
Query sessions table once and assert status Closed with single closed_at value
Count attendance_records with status Absent for previously Pending students
Assert no duplicate SessionClosed events or double Absent updates
cases.expected: First close wins; exactly one Closed transition per BR-01; Pending→Absent applied once

cases.title: Flow A: open session, check-in within window, instructor closes before auto-close
preconditions: Roster seeded for HESD-01 / SWE-101
Draft session with valid GPS created and opened to Active
Test clock within attendance window (openedAt ≤ now ≤ scheduledStart + 10 min)
Authenticated enrolled Student and Instructor sessions available
steps: Student POST /api/v1/check-in with valid token and coordinates; assert outcome Success
Instructor GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance; assert Present count incremented
Instructor POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close before window end
Assert session status Closed and remaining Pending rows become Absent
Student POST /api/v1/check-in again and assert SessionNotActive
cases.expected: End-to-end BR-01 lifecycle: window open allows check-in; manual close ends window and rejects late check-in

cases.title: Present and Excused records preserved when session closes at window end
preconditions: Active session with P Present, E Excused, and K Pending attendance records in PostgreSQL
AutoCloseScheduler triggers close at scheduledStart + 10 minutes
steps: Record Present and Excused record IDs and statuses before close
Invoke AutoCloseScheduler.run() at window end
Query attendance_records for previously Present and Excused IDs
Assert all P Present rows remain Present with checkedInAt unchanged
Assert all E Excused rows remain Excused and K Pending rows are Absent
cases.expected: BR-01 close outcome affects only Pending records; Present and Excused statuses preserved on finalize

cases.title: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close on non-Active session returns InvalidSessionState
preconditions: Draft or Closed session exists
Authenticated Instructor session cookie is set
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close for Draft session
Assert HTTP status 409 and errorCode InvalidSessionState
Repeat for Closed session and assert same rejection
Verify no attendance finalize side effects occurred
cases.expected: Close trigger applies only to Active sessions per validation-rules §3.5; illegal transitions blocked

cases.title: GET preflight returns 403 SessionNotActive when Active session past attendance window
preconditions: Active session with scheduledStart in the past and status still Active
Test clock fixed at scheduledStart + 10 minutes + 1 second before auto-close scheduler runs
Authenticated enrolled Student with valid unexpired QR token
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 with outcome SessionNotActive and errorCode SessionNotActive
Assert localized Vietnamese message indicates session is not active
Query attendance_records and qr_tokens and assert no writes occurred (read-only preflight per validation-rules §3.6a)
cases.expected: Preflight attendance window guard per validation-rules §3.6a step 4 enforces BR-01 before GPS capture; SessionNotActive returned without side effects

cases.title: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current exposes attendanceWindowClosesAt at scheduledStart + 10 minutes
preconditions: Instructor session cookie is set
Active session with scheduledStart known and QR scheduler running
Current time within attendance window (openedAt ≤ now ≤ scheduledStart + 10 min)
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body contains qrPayload, tokenId, issuedAt, expiresAt, secondsRemaining, and attendanceWindowClosesAt
Assert attendanceWindowClosesAt equals scheduledStart + 10 minutes per BR-01 window end and API design §6.1
cases.expected: QR current endpoint publishes nominal attendance window close time during Active session per BR-01; instructor display can show countdown to window end

cases.title: Student check-in preflight blocks GPS step when attendance window has elapsed
preconditions: Active session with scheduledStart in the past; auto-close scheduler not yet run
Test clock fixed at scheduledStart + 10 minutes + 1 second
Authenticated Student navigates to check-in deep link with valid QR token
steps: Student opens check-in page and wait for GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight
Verify SessionNotActive outcome shown inline or on scan step
Verify data-testid gps-capture-step is absent (GpsCaptureStep never mounts per BR-15)
Verify Vietnamese message indicates session not active or attendance window ended
cases.expected: UI enforces BR-01 attendance window at preflight gate per validation-rules §3.6a; student cannot reach GPS capture after window end while session still Active

cases.title: Check-in rejected when openedAt exceeds scheduledStart + 10 min windowEnd
preconditions: Active session opened late: openedAt > scheduledStart + 10 minutes per state-machines §2.4
TestClock fixed at openedAt + 1 second while session status remains Active
CheckInService attendance window guard uses windowEnd = min(closedAt, scheduledStart + 10 min)
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submitCheckIn with valid token, enrollment, and in-radius coordinates
Capture result outcome
Query attendance_records for studentId and sessionId
Assert outcome SessionNotActive and attendance status remains Pending
cases.expected: When windowStart (openedAt) > windowEnd (scheduledStart + 10 min), no valid check-in window exists per state-machines §2.4; SessionNotActive returned per BR-01

cases.title: Check-in before openedAt returns SessionNotActive per windowStart guard
preconditions: Active session with openedAt known
TestClock fixed at openedAt minus 1 second
Authenticated enrolled Student with valid unexpired QR token
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and in-radius coordinates using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 and outcome SessionNotActive with errorCode SessionNotActive
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance for student and assert status remains Pending
cases.expected: Check-in rejected when now < windowStart (openedAt) per state-machines §2.4 even if session status is Active
